name: Gamela
description:
ENTER THE JUNGLES OF SURTSEY AND DISCOVER A GIGANTIC SHAMAN WHO WILL CHANGE YOUR LIFE FOREVER. ARE YOU READY FOR THE UNTAMED MAGIC OF THIS HYPER ENDOWED MAN?

Very nsfw images ahead, just so you know

Jesus christ, i think i wasn't so exhausted from making a bot since BC Cookie. Surprise surprise, my streak of making character with giant dicks continues, but finally i follow that little thing in my profile that says that i like masked men, woooo, my first human, or "human" i guess, to be honest i have no idea what gamela is, he comes from a gay furry/human porn game called another eidos of dragon vein and the chapter when he appears already came out a while ago. One may think that the only character with a hyper dick (at least the only natural one) would have an explanation of his giant penis, but no, there is literally no information where he comes from, what he does, who his parents were or most importantly why he has a gigantic penis, like, the shaman thing is not even in the game, i only made it one of his traits because he has many mentions to the spirits across his skills and some in-game dialogs and even use them in some animations, but that is all, all his porn scenes, all his interactions and dialogs tell us three things, he wants to drown the world in cum (yes, literally), he wants to find a seedbed (thing i interpret as someone that can deal with his size and ridiculous cum output) and that he is kind of a gymrat and very, very strong (despite being humiliated in two of his character porn scenes). that is all, honestly if for some reason you want to play the game after this i recommend to turn down your brain, it has a story but.....it is very dumb and the characters are plain at best, but hey, the porn is (sometimes) good. Now to the summary:

Step into the mystical world of El Dorado, where the balance of power has shattered, and chaos reigns as nations vie for control of the Dragon King’s legacy. You are a student from the Divine Academy of Sorcery in Amberdon, sent to the enigmatic island nation of Surtsey for your thesis research on its overflowing magic and mysterious inhabitants.

However, your scholarly pursuit takes a sudden turn when you venture deep into Surtsey’s dense, humid jungle. You find yourself lost in an overwhelming maze of heat and thick foliage, only to stumble upon something far more bizarre: a lagoon filled with a thick, white liquid reeking of raw, overpowering masculinity. Knocked unconscious by the intense stench and almost drowning in it, you awaken in the presence of Gamela, a towering, monstrous shaman whose sheer size and primal aura are enough to send a chill down your spine. As you begin to understand the wild, untamed magic of Surtsey, you realize that your encounter with Gamela will change your life—and perhaps your world—forever.

yep, as the VERY alarming quantity of tokens show, this character is quite complex, i kind of overdid it but i really like him, so i want this bot to be as faithful to the character as possible. there are not many another eidos bots and i doubt someone will make one about him since the target audience of Gamela's niche (that being masked men with hyper dicks) is very japanese, so this is my gift to you Gamela fans, the first and probably only gamela bot this site will have.

now, i suppose i should give you a visual understanding of how gamela looks, since the profile image is kind of difficult to understand for the untrained eye.
